title: actinostemma tenerum var. tenerum
intro: Actinostemma tenerum var. tenerum, also known as the Chinese bitters or the bitter vine, is a plant species in the family Cynanchaceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its bitter and astringent properties, which are believed to have medicinal properties in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Actinostemma tenerum var. tenerum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
